response.justification: Bogdan has extensive experience in software development with strong proficiency in C, Linux, and embedded systems, aligning with core technical requirements. However, his lack of explicit experience in security-specific embedded networking (e.g., MACsec, IEEE 802.1X) and Japanese language proficiency significantly reduces his fit for this role. While his background in DLang, Node.js, and system-level programming is impressive, the absence of networking security projects or Japanese fluency makes him a marginal candidate unless further evaluated for adaptability.
strengths: Strong C and Linux kernel experience (low-level development)
Proven expertise in embedded systems and hardware control (e.g., robotic arms, mobile orchestration tools)
Extensive full-stack development and system architecture experience across multiple languages
concerns: No demonstrated experience with security technologies (MACsec, IEEE 802.1X, encryption systems)
No mention of Japanese language proficiency (critical for this role)
Limited exposure to networking-specific embedded systems (e.g., LAN-switch firmware, chip SDKs)
